instructions.instruction: Run hclfmt --check and terragrunt validate as the first structural validation steps.
Detect custom providers/modules and look up their documentation before validating usage.
NEVER treat a clean hclfmt result as full validation; run terragrunt validate as well.
Run a security scan (Trivy) and report findings with their check ids.
When a validation tool is missing, inform the user, offer the install command, and ask before skipping.
Exclude downloaded/cached modules from security scans to avoid noise.
